title: Assume The Forbidden
prompt: A sphinx bars the room. Complete its proof to banish it.
help: This room holds 2 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) negation_intro(A) then hp := A ⊢ False; then implication_elim(A, False) against f and hp. (2) negation_intro(¬A) then hp := ¬A ⊢ False; then negation_elim(A) from x and hp.
